scenario_summary: Electrical energy storage landscape, April 2023: grid models (traditional vs distributed), AGC/SCADA/spinning reserve/fast-response, storage types (electrical, hydro, hydrogen), energy platform + integration layer, and material supply chain.
notes: Single pass using prompt-only baseline; no access to reference .owm files.
Audited every edge for the ν(a) ≥ ν(b) hard rule and fixed one violation (Spinning Reserve → Electricity Generation flipped to Electricity Generation → Spinning Reserve).
22 components + 1 anchor; 31 dependency edges; 6 evolve arrows; 3 inertia markers; 3 notes.
